title: syngramma minima
intro: Syngramma minima, also known as the Small Sword Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, native to tropical Africa and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Syngramma minima include its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Syngramma minima is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and its leaves are also used in traditional African medicine to make a poultice for wound healing.
